{{CargoRelic
|name=collection@20872_1
|class_id=20872
|rank=Green
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=collection@20872_2
|fame=15
|art=14
|fth=13
|civ=16
|tech=31
|ss1=Snail Leadership +2<br>prop@58575_2<br>Lucky Star Gained: 4500/4500
|ss2=Snail Leadership +4<br>prop@58575_2<br>Lucky Star Gained: 4500/4500
|ss3=Snail Leadership +6<br>prop@58575_2<br>Lucky Star Gained: 4500/4500
|ss4=Snail Leadership +6<br>prop@58575_2<br>Lucky Star Gained: 4500/4500
|ss7=Snail Leadership +6<br>prop@58575_2<br>Lucky Star Gained: 4500/4500<br> (Awakened)
}}
